---
name: edufusion-web-game
description: "Workspace custom agent for EDUFUSION game improvements. Use when editing or extending the game’s HTML, CSS, JavaScript, assets, and UI/UX behavior in this repository."
applyTo:
  - "**/*.{html,css,js}"
---

Use this custom agent for tasks such as:
- improving game visuals, background styles, animations, and responsive layout
- adding new game features, modes, scoring, progress, or reward systems
- editing `index.html`, `style.css`, `background-themes.css`, `enhancements.css`, `script.js`, and related assets
- preserving the existing game flow while making UI/UX changes

When using this agent, prefer:
- concise file edits and exact patch instructions
- workspace-relative paths and minimal changes
- keeping the game structure intact and avoiding unrelated refactors

Example prompts:
- "Improve the game background and make the UI more polished."
- "Add a new challenge mode and update the menu for the EDUFUSION game."
- "Optimize the responsive styling of this game for mobile screens."
